title: SessionLaunchInfo
description: Launch-time metadata recorded in session-meta JSONL entries.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the JSONL file.

workDir.description: Working directory the session was launched in.

repository.description: Repository metadata when the session was launched via a git repository.

requestedWorkDir.description: Workdir the user requested when launching.

worktree.description: True when the session was launched in an isolated worktree.

worktreeSlug.description: Short worktree slug used in directory naming.

worktreeBranch.description: Branch checked out inside the worktree.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory.

worktreeSession.description: Worktree session metadata, or null when the session was torn down.

customTitle.description: Last custom-title entry, or null when not set.

runtimeProviderId.description: Provider ID used for the runtime (Anthropic, Bedrock, etc.).

runtimeModelId.description: Model ID used at runtime (claude-opus-4-8, etc.).
